_trn_update_manual_required: Auto-update not available. Download manually or update through your package manager.
_trn_update_pending_description: The update will be installed when you close the app
_trn_update_ready_description: Install now or wait until you quit the app
_trn_update_failed_description: An error occurred during the update process
_trn_update_timeout_description: Unable to communicate with update service. Please try again.
_trn_update_in_progress_description: An update operation is already in progress
_trn_update_snapshot_description: Update checks are disabled for snapshot builds
_trn_update_check_failed_description: Could not start update check. Please try again.
